findings.description: Section s17 has an empty title ("") but contains な行 terms (内蔵サーバ). All other alphabetical subsections have proper titles (あ行, か行, さ行, た行, は行, ら行, わ行). The title should be "な行" for consistency.
findings.source_evidence: Source has a dedicated 「な行」 subsection header containing 内蔵サーバ as its sole term.
